title: Deltarune Music Discs
description: A resource pack that replaces all music discs with songs from Deltarune chapters 1-4
body:
Can be used on any version, you can safely ignore the warning from the game :P

A resource pack that replaces all music disc songs with songs from Deltarune Chapters 1-4

Made using sirmephistopheles6666's music resource pack template

Deltarune OST composed by Toby Fox

Deltarune created by Toby Fox

List of which vanilla songs are replaced by which Deltarune songs:

5 - A DARK ZONE

11 - Breath

13 - It’s TV Time

Blocks - Chaos King

Cat - Ever Higher

Chirp - Field of Hopes and Dreams

Creator - Attack of the Killer Queen

Creator (Music Box) - Cool Mixtape

Far - Hammer of Justice

Lava Chicken - And Now For Today’s Sponsors

Mall - THE WORLD REVOLVING

Mellohi - BIG SHOT

Otherside - Dark Sanctuary

Pigstep - TV World

Precipice - The Third Sanctuary

Relic - GUARDIAN

Stal - Black Knife

Strad - NOW’S YOUR CHANCE TO BE A

Tears - The Distance Between Two

Wait - Lancer

Ward - A CYBER’S WORLD?
